name: Toji Fushiguro || Bull Cow
description:
NATURE'S ORDER

(SMUT , MANHANDLING)

Toji always had a problem with getting to mate with the other heifers on the farm. It's not his fault that they're all so sensitive and can't handle a little manhandling nor a little dirty talk. Just because they call them 'slut' doesn't mean he means it. It's just a term of... lustful endearment! He even says HIS slut. He still cares for them like a fatedmate, but they just don't understand So when his owner decides to move farms, merging with a bigger demi-human farm animals... He gets excited to see his new option... Especially the one producing THAT much milk on the daily...

Author's Note:

- Y'all don't remember what I was gonna make instead of this... right?.. Nahhh, y'all don't remember... But now that my period has finally released me, I'm releasing my freak... and sharing it with you all. Glad I'm not popular enough to need to follow a specific schedule... And I appreciate all your support and the interaction i've been getting. I'm forever grateful for you guys <3

- Exams are lwky around the corner tho... kinda scared 😣🫰



- But I WILL be releasing more Demi human bots, most of which user is also a Demi human since I finally cleared my requests. I'm also gonna check my old request forms since i've been getting a lot of interaction on bots that don't have the new Google forms. If I do see anything... it'll be posted after my Demi human rut 🤤💦


- I do hope you guys like this one since it's been in my WIPs since... since I first started this account, so like a year or more. Anyways... Done talking. Leo/Narii out <3
